## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content production progress, review processes, and plan for wrapping up the engagement between Mindr and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Mindr is transitioning to handle content work internally; GrowthX engagement ending Dec 16](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [106 topics in progress; 35 articles approved, 27 pending review](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Brian to provide feedback on recent articles to guide final content generation](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Legal review process to be expedited; GrowthX to focus on content quality before handoff](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

## Topics

### Project Status and Transition

  - [106 topics in progress, nearly matching the original 180 target](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [35 articles approved, 27 pending review](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Brian transitioning from Intox Lock website work to providing feedback on GrowthX articles](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Mindr deciding to handle content work internally for budget efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Brian to review 3-5 articles from the 27 pending, focusing on recent ones](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Feedback will guide improvements and inform the final \~35 article generation](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [6 articles reviewed by Jessica; comments addressed and ready for re-review](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Goal: Push all articles to legal review before Dec 16, maintaining quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

### Legal Review Acceleration

  - [6 articles currently with legal team for review](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Brian to review content before sending to legal](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [No JIRA integration due to user seat limitations](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Plan to send articles to legal as they're ready, not waiting for all to be complete](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### Content Strategy and Future Topics

  - [Prateek to add 10-20 new topics for potential future content](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Brian to email suggestions on content focus areas after reviewing recent batches](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### Engagement Wrap-up

  - [GrowthX to provide all work-in-progress content by last touchbase](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Mindr acknowledges value delivered during engagement](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Final Slack update to follow meeting](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Brian to review 4-5 articles by end of day/mid-tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Brian to email content focus suggestions to Prateek](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Prateek to start content production on remaining 35 articles upon approval](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Team to expedite pushing approved articles to legal review](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare final content handover for Dec 16 wrap-up](https://fathom.video/share/3m9gVnwy45MLQ158FmpFiczKAmyxKiuB?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
